name: guard-firearm-management
description: Guard Firearm Management System - Web Application

scripts.build:android: vite build --mode mobile && npm run sync --prefix ../apps/android-capacitor
scripts.build:desktop: vite build --mode desktop && npm run build --prefix ../apps/desktop-tauri
scripts.release:web: npm run release:check -- web && vite build --mode web
scripts.release:desktop: npm run release:check -- desktop && vite build --mode desktop && npm run tauri:build:prod --prefix ../apps/desktop-tauri
scripts.release:android: npm run release:check -- android && vite build --mode mobile && npm run release:assemble --prefix ../apps/android-capacitor
scripts.release:android:bundle: npm run release:check -- android-bundle && vite build --mode mobile && npm run release:bundle --prefix ../apps/android-capacitor
scripts.release:all: npm run release:web && npm run release:desktop && npm run release:android
